summary: Completed comprehensive testing of January 2026 features: Royal Kewda product, Customer Reviews for Bakhoor products, WhatsApp floating button, and AI SEO/GEO enhancements (llms.txt). All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for these features
seed_data_creation: N/A - products already seeded in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All January 2026 features verified working: Royal Kewda product (50g @ ₹110, Kewda/Jasmine/White Musk notes, 0 reviews), Customer Reviews section on Bakhoor products (Grated Omani: 4.9/7 reviews, Yemeni: 4.8/5 reviews), WhatsApp button (wa.me/919667269711), llms.txt and llms-full.txt accessible with correct content, Product structured data includes Review schemas for Bakhoor products and excludes aggregateRating for Royal Kewda (0 reviews).

royal_kewda_product.details: Product page loads at /products/royal-kewda with ₹110 price, 50g size, correct fragrance notes (Kewda, Jasmine, White Musk), Add to Cart working, 0 reviews displayed correctly

customer_reviews_grated_omani.details: Customer Reviews section visible on /products/grated-omani-bakhoor with 4.9 rating, 7 reviews, rating breakdown bars, Show All 7 Reviews button

customer_reviews_yemeni.details: Customer Reviews section visible on /products/yemeni-bakhoor-chips with 4.8 rating, 5 reviews, rating breakdown bars, Show All 5 Reviews button

customer_reviews_kesar_chandan.details: Customer Reviews section correctly NOT visible on /products/kesar-chandan (no customerReviews data)

whatsapp_button.details: WhatsApp floating button visible on homepage and product pages, links to wa.me/919667269711

llms_txt.details: /llms.txt accessible and contains Addrika brand info, Royal Kewda, Bakhoor products

llms_full_txt.details: /llms-full.txt accessible and contains full product documentation

product_structured_data_with_reviews.details: Product JSON-LD on /products/grated-omani-bakhoor includes individual Review schemas and aggregateRating (4.9, 7 reviews)

product_structured_data_no_reviews.details: Product JSON-LD on /products/royal-kewda does NOT include aggregateRating (0 reviews)

homepage_products.details: Homepage loads all 10 products including Royal Kewda in the product grid

bakhoor_ratings_display.details: Bakhoor ratings show correctly: Grated Omani (4.9, 7 reviews), Yemeni (4.8, 5 reviews), Royal Kewda (0, 0 reviews)
